title: Thana's Mekanism Lights
description: If you hate putting light source every 3 blocks this mod is for you. This mod adds mekanism style lights with light range depending on tier.
body:
If you hate putting light source every 3 blocks this mod is for you. This mod adds mekanism style lights with light range depending on tier.

Lights are turned on/off by right click while crouching.

### Config

![](https://thanatoros.com/images/deactivateriptideflight/faq.png)

Power Consumption, light range and how often light recalculating happens can be configured to your liking in config file.

Usually (%appdata% -> .minecraft -> config -> thanasmekanismlights.properties)

### **I have an issue / bug / crash / report / request, where can I contact you about it ?**

Use my Discord server, you can join it here -> https://discord.gg/y366spsSjv

### **Can I put this mod into my modpack ?**

Yes you can. Would appreciate mention of mod/author/link in modpacks description/credits.

### **Does this mod support servers ?**

Yes it does.
